caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white shirt with gold suspenders, a red bow tie, and a distinctive gray wig styled upwards. The setting appears to be a barbershop, as evidenced by the framed pictures on the wall behind him, which seem to depict various people, possibly customers or notable figures associated with the shop. The man is wearing headphones and appears to be engaged in conversation, possibly discussing topics related to business or personal development. The atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional environment, blending elements of a traditional barbershop with modern media production.
